title: San Jose State volleyball player on why she outed her transgender teammate
body: When ur in college & live in an on-campus dorm or even off campus apartments, u sometimes have no say at all in who ur roommates are - speaking from lots of personal experience. Just b/c she's speaking about it now, doesn't mean she didn't have a problem w/ it from the get-go...The girl was trying to secure her education (could've been there on a scholarship 🤷🏽‍♀️) & had to think about what she'd lose if she started "causing a fuss". Now that she's a senior & about to (hopefully) graduate anyway, she has some freedom to be able to speak up...
author: @MsCortneySoHollywood

title: SJSU Campus Tour | San Jose State University | USA
body: Proud SJSU alumni here. The Olympics statue is Tommie Smith & John Carlos. In the 1968 Olympics in Mexico City they raised their fists as a silent protest for civil rights. Also, the Cesar Chavez Monument features Gandhi because Gandhi was a great inspiration to Cesar Chavez who was an activist fighting for farm workers rights. Chavez very much believed in non-violent protest. Thanks for the video!!
author: @davidramirez591

title: SJSU Campus Tour | San Jose State University | USA

Currently I am studying at SJSU definitely its was worth all the hassle. Its really the best university I got have gotten into.

title: SJSU Campus Tour | San Jose State University | USA
body: The bell is very important......is not just a bell.  Before UCLA was UCLA it was the southern California branch of San Jose State Normal School (SJSU).  The bell was made to commemorate that once Los Angeles State Normal School changed to the UC system and became UCLA.

title: things I wish I knew before coming to SJSU...
body: If you’re going to live on campus at SJSU, I highly recommend living in Washburn. It’s the cheapest dorm, and you can tell, but you’re most likely to meet new people in that dorm out of all of them. Don’t be afraid to knock on your neighbors’ doors! A lot of people also live their doors open during the first few weeks to welcome people in anyway

title: what to know before attending sjsu!! | housing, social life & more
body: So I’m having trouble with choosing between SFSU and CSU East Bay. For San Fran, my major I’m getting into Biology/Marine Science/Botany. For East Bay it’s Environmental Science - Environmental Health. My issue is having to PICK between the two. I don’t know the way of life for either cities and I really want to consider what kind of .. “Education” I can get. Like I want classes that focus more on field laboratories and that are hands on and connect us with agencies/departments around California you know? Thinking about real world stuff. I want the most out if my education so it’s hard for me to choose

title: VOLLEYBALL WEEKEND IN MY LIFE | San Jose State University
body: I had started volleyball when I was like 14 or so and now I'm 18. I recently joined a serious training group to prepare for my exam. I was going to move away for my college life but the bond I have with the group made me choose not to. I will never regret joining these guys. They teach me so much and never made me feel down, cry or even belittle me since I'm a girl. That's one of the things I am thankful for in my life and will forever be

title: COLLEGE WEEK IN MY LIFE | My First Week of Junior Year!
body: Ayyy I'm from montreal! I love it there. And yes, the food here is great if you know where to go! If you're craving indian, I really recommend Le taj! MY FAV RESTAURANT. If you like museums, I recommend the Musée d'art contemporain! Also, if you have time to go out with you friends, I recommend going to a club, bar or restaurant in the Plateau Mont Royal! (You can go there by metro, it's super easy)

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: I went to SJSU. There is virtually no research, but the students end up working in great companies, and its affordable.
author: @heyaswinp

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: I went to UC Berkeley for undergrad, got a high school teaching credential from San Jose State, and I currently cover Stanford athletics for the Rivals network. So I'm familiar with all three schools. I'll just say this: San Jose State has been a very underrated school for a long time. I'm happy to see it getting some love!
author: @slamdunk406

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: It’s proximity to Fortune 500 companies also the big 3 in tech (apple, nvidia, and google) makes all the difference
author: @lemondrop7305

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: I just transferred in for my first semester. It’s  a pretty nice school. I commute for school. Cost me about $4.4k for a semester
author: @zachjelinekphotography

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: Went there from 2013-17 for computer science and was satisfied with the education. It just gets overshadowed by UC Berkeley, Stanford, Santa Clara, and other top colleges alike because it doesn’t offer students as rich and immersive of an experience as the other colleges but for those who want to keep it simple and do what’s needed and don’t really care about extra stuff, this is the best option for a lot of people. Graduated with only $30k in total expenses as a commuter while any other college would cost that much per year
author: @BRBallin1

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: I was there about a year ago on a tour for a younger family member.  I was amazed at how charming the University was, and all of the interesting features and services with new (ish?) buildings.
author: @bestiefswlady5251

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: 1990 SJSU BSEE and worked as an FAE in the semiconductor world.  While there was 1 or 2 Stanford grads I met that were good engineers, the vast majority were terrible and needed help with the most basic concepts. Guess they were used to getting help?  Met lots of great competent SJSU engineers along the way.  Glad they are getting some recognition.
author: @LaByron-w6f

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: Go SJSU! I graduated with a business degree in 2012 and I’m now a Finance Director at Google, all because I was able to leverage the alumni network. Very underrated school.
author: @celica9098

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: SJSU'16 here. Except for the cost of living and effort required to be attentive, the learning experience in the valley is nice.
author: @thejaskrishnan7507

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body:
I go to Berkeley, and I respect the work ethic and humbleness of SJSU. A hidden gem in the Bay Area and one if not the best CSU in the state. Many of the PhDs here have undergrad degrees from SF State, and many are SJSU alumni.

I am looking to maybe get a master's from there since it's affordable and closer to my home town. Many of my favorite GSI's and High School teachers are from SJSU.
author: @Nostolic

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: Go Spartans!!  CompE alumni here. Got a great job after graduating with a little debt. I paid off my student loan within 6 months.
author: @trido3815

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: The school preps the students well for bigger companies. Its an easy transition.  Its basically the same format but instead of school its actually working in a company.
author: @sonnytruong1955

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: A great school for almost any major except computer science. It’s the Bay, so good luck trying to get in, CS is so impacted and competitive that they treat it like a badge of honor, yet make no effort to fix the problem. Many people I know in CS mention the lack of additional classes and the need for better professors. One of the CS Coordinators even said to look elsewhere because of how impacted it is.
author: @hydralynx5326

title: San Jose State University makes massive jump in new college rankings
body: I went to SJSU to do my lower division classes but graduated from evergreen valley college in business administration for associate degree.  Best decision I’ve ever made.
